states_list_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns states_list (1a94iln)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-9G"

states_list_length.sql_string:
---- Length states_list (1a94iln)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-9G")

states_list_data.sql_string:
---- Data states_list 1a94iln
SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-9G"

total_stats_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns total_stats (1dpk2j0)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    sum(voter_count) as total_registered,
    count(distinct state) as unique_states,
    count(distinct party) as parties
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where state like '%'
) AS "inputQuery-G5"

total_stats_length.sql_string:
---- Length total_stats (1dpk2j0)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    sum(voter_count) as total_registered,
    count(distinct state) as unique_states,
    count(distinct party) as parties
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where state like '%'
) AS "inputQuery-G5")

total_stats_data.sql_string:
---- Data total_stats 1dpk2j0
SELECT * FROM (select
    sum(voter_count) as total_registered,

from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_counts
where state like '%'
) AS "inputQuery-G5"

turnout_stats_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns turnout_stats (1onaa7m)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    sum(voted_count) as total_voted,
    sum(total_voters) as total_registered,
    sum(voted_count)::numeric / sum(total_voters) as overall_turnout
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout
where state like '%'
) AS "inputQuery-qh"

turnout_stats_length.sql_string:
---- Length turnout_stats (1onaa7m)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    sum(voted_count) as total_voted,
    sum(total_voters) as total_registered,
    sum(voted_count)::numeric / sum(total_voters) as overall_turnout
from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout
where state like '%'
) AS "inputQuery-qh")

from voter_analytics.mrt_voter_turnout

state_summary_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns state_summary (1o19blk)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    sum(total_voters) as voter_count,
    sum(voted_count) as voted_gen24,
    voted_gen24::numeric / voter_count as turnout_rate
from mrt_voter_turnout
where state like '%'
group by state
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-d3"

state_summary_length.sql_string:
---- Length state_summary (1o19blk)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    state,
    sum(total_voters) as voter_count,
    sum(voted_count) as voted_gen24,
    voted_gen24::numeric / voter_count as turnout_rate
from mrt_voter_turnout
where state like '%'
group by state
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-d3")
